title: Rich Italian Peach Stir-fry
description: A rich and silky Sicilian-inspired dish featuring ancho chilies and other aromatic ingredients that are crowd-pleasing and diabetic-friendly-friendly.
instructions: Place the peaches in a large bowl and cut them into slices. Remove the seeds and pits.
In a small saucepan, add olive oil and butter over medium heat. Once melted and hot, add garlic cloves and ginger until fragrant, about 30 seconds.
Add ancho chilies to the pan with their seeds still attached. Saute for another minute or two until they start to soften slightly.
Fold in sliced peaches, thyme leaves, salt, and pepper into the mixture. Stir occasionally until the peach slices are softened but not mushy.
Let it simmer over low heat for about 15 minutes, stirring frequently, until all the liquid has evaporated and the sauce is rich.
